Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 217 

SPCH_PTHLGY_CHRG_AMT 

LABEL: Speech Pathology Charge Amount ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for speech pathology services (speech, language, 
audiology) provided during the beneficiary's stay. 

SHORT NAME: SPCH_AMT 

LONG NAME: SPCH_PTHLGY_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating
